description_long: This is a mid-sized, three-story apartment building with a pinkish brick facade and a steep, dark gray hip roof. The front features large, grid-patterned windows arranged symmetrically, and a central double-door entrance flanked by potted plants. Both side elevations have balconies with blue railings, providing outdoor space for several units. Mature trees and shrubbery are present around the building, adding greenery and shade to the urban setting. The ground level is set on a wide, paved area, likely serving as a sidewalk or communal space. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on symmetry and functional outdoor elements.
description: A three-story pink brick apartment building with a dark hip roof, large grid windows, and blue-railed balconies on the sides, surrounded by trees and paved ground.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with double doors, symmetrical large windows, and potted plants flanking the entryway.
description_view_1: This side view highlights two blue-railed balconies and a large tree partially obscuring the lower floors.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a uniform window arrangement and a garage door on the ground floor, with no visible balconies.
description_view_3: The opposite side view features two blue-railed balconies and dense shrubbery near the building's base.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a symmetrical grid pattern across all facades, with consistent spacing and alignment between floors and sides.
